AUDIT-P0-APP.selector: 真实 App 重装与四方版本 identity。

AUDIT-P0-DATA.selector: 真实数据根目录与账户/持仓 Read Model。

AUDIT-P0-METRIC.selector: 非假零、真实财务指标和 SQLite 持久化。

AUDIT-P0-ROUTE.selector: 真实路由、差异化页面、三个核心工作流。

AUDIT-P1-FORMULA.selector: 公式注册表、双消费、FX、Interconnection、模型验证和报告同源。

risks: Open P0/P1 findings remain production-acceptance blockers until their Roadmap resolution tasks and evidence gates close.
Owner, release, App, runtime, data-root, and production-proof truth remains intentionally fail-closed.
The parameter-owner diagnostic remains the expected 3-pass/5-fail baseline and is not a Phase gate pass.
The original Phase commit and attestation remain immutable; any compensation-scope byte change invalidates the compensation hash graph and requires revalidation.
rollback: Preserve original Phase commit 31368570082c34eca50c72c7d7b2ef46b0e6854d and its immutable attestation; before the compensating commit remove only the exact 15-path compensation diff, and after commit use only another append-only-safe correction without rewriting prior evidence or attestations.
